positive: Minimalist graphic design featuring a large, stylized celestial body (a crescent moon and stars) integrated with elegant, flowing botanical elements like bioluminescent leaves and twisting vines. The composition should be centered, utilizing negative space heavily to create a clean, scalable print design. Use a limited, striking color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, and matte gold accents. The aesthetic should blend cosmic mystery with organic symmetry, giving a feeling of nocturnal wonder and sophisticated naturalism. Perfect for apparel printing, strong silhouette definition, vectorized appearance, flat graphic style, centered composition.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, signature, watermark, low detail, text, blurry, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, photorealistic, 3d render, overly complex, messy lines, gradient wash, smoke
